About this item

  • Marimekko in Patterns: Elevate your kitchen routine with the sumptuous touch of Marimekko's white dinnerware, featuring quality materials and exquisite patterns; personalize with mix-and-match options for an eclectic kitchen set
  • Designer Dinnerware Sets: Maija Isola is Marimekko's most celebrated designer; her innovative aesthetics and intricate detailing turn these mediumbowls into functional yet fashionable additions to your tableware collection
  • Contemporary and Stylish: The Oiva Unikko salad bowl artfully fuses comfort and aesthetics, radically transforming an ordinary medium white bowl into high-end, stylish pieces; a confluence of beauty and utility for your kitchen essentials
  • Urban Nature-Inspired Porcelain Dinnerware Set: Born from allotment gardening inspiration, this bowl embodies sustainable living and the joy of handwork; city gardens come to life, and a rag rug tells its vibrant story
  • Versatile & Superior Material: Crafted from durable stoneware, this porcelain bowl has a long lifespan and patterns that won’t fade; it is dishwasher, microwave, freezer, and oven safe; remove the sticker before use as it contains a trace of metal

    Sustainability features for this product

    Sustainability features

    This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.
    Safer chemicals
    Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.
    As certified by
    Global Organic Textile Standard

    Global Organic Textile Standard

    Global Organic Textile Standard (GOTS) certified clothing and home products are based on standards for the processing of clothing and home materials made with organic fibre. Global Organic Textiles certified products contain a minimum of 70% organic fibres. These fibres are made with no GMOs, no highly hazardous chemicals, and no child labour. Producers must have a strong system to protect the health, safety, and rights of their employees and have strict wastewater treatment practices.

    Certification Level

    CONTAINS 95-100% ORGANIC CONTENT

    Certification Body

    IDFL

    Certification Number

    GOTS-19801
    OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100

    OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100

    OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certified products require every component of a textiles production including all thread, buttons, and trims to be tested against a list of more than 1,000 regulated and unregulated chemicals which may be harmful to human health. The assessment process is globally standardised, independently conducted, and updated at least once per year based on new scientific information or regulatory requirements.

    Certification Body

    HOHENSTEIN

    Certification Number

    07.JA.56511

Product Description

Upgrade Your Dinnerware & Accessories with MARIMEKKO Oiva Unikko Blue and White Bowls (30oz):

Elevate your dinner routine with a touch of sophistication with our luxury dinnerware sets. Celebrating Maija Isola's exquisite artistry, our microwave safe bowl showcases Unikko, a timeless pattern born in 1964 as an abstraction of a flower. Inspired by the defiance of Marimekko's founder, Armi Ratia, Unikko remains a powerful emblem of joy and creativity, seamlessly integrated into Marimekko's design identity. This ceramic fruit bowl is the perfect addition to your home essentials; it’s a masterpiece of functional art that brings timeless elegance into your dining experience, elevating the ordinary to the extraordinary. The ceramic gives these ceramic bowls a long lifespan and long-lasting patterns.

Enter a world of daily opulence with Marimekko Oiva Unikko white soup bowls. These premium Finnish-designed stoneware dinnerware pieces bring luxury to your dining table, offering a daily dose of decadence.

Our Oiva Unikko stoneware dinnerware sets effortlessly complement any kitchen décor while adding a touch of sophistication. This ceramic bowl is not just a cute bowl; it's crafted for stylish functionality and convenience. With its design, durable construction, and vibrant aesthetics, Marimekko’s white porcelain dinnerware set is perfect for any occasion or family gathering, as well as a thoughtful present for décor or culinary enthusiasts.

Marimekko, a distinguished Finnish design company, is celebrated for its original prints and vibrant colors. Our diverse portfolio includes premium clothing, bags, accessories, and home décor items, showcasing the brand's unique identity since its founding in 1951.

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

About this Item

  • Marimekko in Patterns: Elevate your kitchen routine with the sumptuous touch of Marimekko's white dinnerware, featuring quality materials and exquisite patterns; personalize with mix-and-match options for an eclectic kitchen set
  • Designer Dinnerware Sets: Maija Isola is Marimekko's most celebrated designer; her innovative aesthetics and intricate detailing turn these mediumbowls into functional yet fashionable additions to your tableware collection
  • Contemporary and Stylish: The Oiva Unikko salad bowl artfully fuses comfort and aesthetics, radically transforming an ordinary medium white bowl into high-end, stylish pieces; a confluence of beauty and utility for your kitchen essentials
  • Urban Nature-Inspired Porcelain Dinnerware Set: Born from allotment gardening inspiration, this bowl embodies sustainable living and the joy of handwork; city gardens come to life, and a rag rug tells its vibrant story
  • Versatile & Superior Material: Crafted from durable stoneware, this porcelain bowl has a long lifespan and patterns that won’t fade; it is dishwasher, microwave, freezer, and oven safe; remove the sticker before use as it contains a trace of metal

Product Description

Upgrade Your Dinnerware & Accessories with MARIMEKKO Oiva Unikko Blue and White Bowls (30oz): Elevate your dinner routine with a touch of sophistication with our luxury dinnerware sets. Celebrating Maija Isola's exquisite artistry, our microwave safe bowl showcases Unikko, a timeless pattern born in 1964 as an abstraction of a flower. Inspired by the defiance of Marimekko's founder, Armi Ratia, Unikko remains a powerful emblem of joy and creativity, seamlessly integrated into Marimekko's design identity. This ceramic fruit bowl is the perfect addition to your home essentials; it’s a masterpiece of functional art that brings timeless elegance into your dining experience, elevating the ordinary to the extraordinary. The ceramic gives these ceramic bowls a long lifespan and long-lasting patterns. Enter a world of daily opulence with Marimekko Oiva Unikko white soup bowls. These premium Finnish-designed stoneware dinnerware pieces bring luxury to your dining table, offering a daily dose of decadence. Our Oiva Unikko stoneware dinnerware sets effortlessly complement any kitchen décor while adding a touch of sophistication. This ceramic bowl is not just a cute bowl; it's crafted for stylish functionality and convenience. With its design, durable construction, and vibrant aesthetics, Marimekko’s white porcelain dinnerware set is perfect for any occasion or family gathering, as well as a thoughtful present for décor or culinary enthusiasts. Marimekko, a distinguished Finnish design company, is celebrated for its original prints and vibrant colors. Our diverse portfolio includes premium clothing, bags, accessories, and home décor items, showcasing the brand's unique identity since its founding in 1951.
